name: Splitleaf Philodendron Temperature Constraints
description: Ensures Splitleaf Philodendron is kept within its safe temperature range (53.6°F - 89.6°F).
response_pass: Safe! Room temperature is optimal for Splitleaf Philodendron.
response_fail: CRITICAL: Splitleaf Philodendron requires temperature between 53.6°F and 89.6°F.
